goal: Predict bulk_modulus, density, tg for PSFO (*Oc1ccc(C(C)(C)c2ccc(Oc3ccc(S(=O)(=O)c4ccc(*)cc4)cc3)cc2)cc1) — PSU2 revision run with locked seeds and nchain=10
assumptions: PSU1 (run-1) validated PCFF/PPPM on this exact SMILES: Tg=499.7K (+8% vs 463K exp), density=1.187 g/cm3 (-4.3% vs 1.24), K=4.43 GPa (exp 4.0-5.5 GPa, within range). PSU2 replicates with fixed seeds and nchain=10 for reproducibility.
is_glassy=True (T_workflow_K=700 >> 300K equilibration T; Tg measured PSU1=499.7K >> 300K).
Murnaghan NPT 300K is the primary BM method (Born removed 2026-06-21: PCFF+PPPM virial incompatibility).
tg_rates=[40,160,400] K/ns replaces PSU1 rate of 640 K/ns which degenerated; rates from polymer_rules.json.

uncertainties.name: ff_transferability
uncertainties.description: No class-specific PCFF MD validation paper for PSFO yet (ff_note in polymer_rules.json). PSU1 empirical anchor reduces this risk: Tg within 8%, density within 4.3%, K within range. Remaining uncertainty from PSU1 Tg overestimate typical of MD cooling rates.

uncertainties.name: hardware_optimum
uncertainties.description: values_are_benchmarked=false; directional_probe measured on A800 (4x40GB) vs live RTX 6000 (4x24GB) — host mismatch. Estimated cell ~10,800 atoms is 3.6x the benchmark cell (3020 atoms), outside the [0.5x,2x] adoption window. by_forcefield default (kokkos, mpi=1) adopted conservatively.

evidence.claim: PCFF (Class II) via EMC. Sun (1994) CFF93/PCFF is the force field origin; covers aryl-SO2-aryl and aryl-ether torsions via Class II cross terms. S atom types so2/o_2s verified in polymer_rules.json notes. PPPM mandatory: sulfone S (+0.08e), sulfone O (-0.11e), ether O charges from bond-increments accumulate to non-negligible long-range Coulomb.

PSU1 empirical validation: Tg=499.7K vs exp 463K (+8.1%), density=1.187 g/cm3 vs exp 1.24 (-4.3%), K=4.43 GPa vs exp range [4.0,5.5] GPa (within range). Same FF/builder path confirmed working for this exact SMILES.
Hayashi2022 and Afzal2021 provide supporting validation for PCFF on aromatic sulfone systems.
Afzal2021 supporting PSFO validation.

alternatives.name: OPLS-AA
alternatives.reason_rejected: OPLS-AA lacks Class II cross terms for aryl ether + sulfone; no PSFO-specific validation. PCFF is the polymer_rules.json preferred_ff with DOI.

alternatives.name: GAFF2
alternatives.reason_rejected: GAFF2 not validated for PSFO; known >45% Tg error for polar aromatic polymers in comparable classes (PACR precedent).

evidence.claim: PCFF uses bond-increment charges by construction. Sulfone S ≈+0.08e, sulfone O ≈-0.11e per S-O bond; ether O and aromatic carbons carry increments from PCFF frc tables. These are native PCFF values, NOT OPLS/QM magnitudes. A charge of exactly 0.0000 on S or O indicates a missing frc increment and must be caught at build time (per polymer_rules.json note). No external QM charge assignment needed.

alternatives.name: RESP/AM1-BCC
alternatives.reason_rejected: Inconsistent with PCFF energy expression; would create mixed charge/vdW parametrization. charge_method=none is the correct PCFF path.

evidence.claim: PSFO backbone contains S (sulfone), O (sulfone x2, ether x2), and aromatic C — all carrying PCFF bond-increment partial charges. Electrostatics_decision_guide in polymer_rules.json mandates PPPM for any heteroatom-bearing backbone with |q|>0.1e. Ether O charges (~-0.2e) and sulfone O (~-0.11e per bond) each exceed 0.1e. PPPM mandatory per policy.
PSU1 ran with PPPM successfully; lj_cut-only would produce significant density and Tg bias for this polar backbone.

alternatives.name: lj/cut (no long-range Coulomb)
alternatives.reason_rejected: Known to bias density/Tg by 5-20% for polar backbones per decision_policy.json D-03 rationale. Excluded by heteroatom content.

evidence.claim: DP=20 matches polymer_rules.json dp_min hard floor for PSFO (Fox-Flory plateau for Tg/bulk_modulus); dp_typical=25 would add GPU cost without PSU1 precedent support — PSU1 ran DP=20 successfully.

nchain=10 deviates from polymer_rules default (nchain=8) to increase statistical sampling and match REVISION_PARAMS.md locked value for PSU2 replication baseline. Cell atom estimate: ~54 atoms/monomer (all-atom PCFF) × DP=20 × nchain=10 ≈ 10,800 atoms. Sufficient for cutoff_A=12 Å with ~3 periodic images at typical PSU density.
PSU1 DP=20 nchain=8 (~8640 atoms) gave density 1.187 g/cm3 and K within exp range. nchain=10 increases sampling; no finite-size concern flagged for PSU1.

alternatives.name: DP=25, nchain=8 (polymer_rules defaults)
alternatives.reason_rejected: PSU1 used DP=20 with good results. REVISION_PARAMS.md locks DP=20, nchain=10 for PSU2; deviating would break the replication baseline.

decisions.choice: glassy equil gate: density plateau + CV<25% + P2<0.10 gating; C(t)/MSD advisory

evidence.claim: PSFO is a rigid aromatic backbone (Tg~463-493K). At T_equil=700K (~207K above Tg) chain relaxation is slow. policy:D-05_convergence require_glassy applies: DP=20 < 30 (require_glassy threshold is DP>=30), so standard overall_pass applies. However, PSFO aromatic backbone makes C(t)/C∞ undefined via atom-type backbone (ct_gate_reliable=false per polymer_rules.json). The equil-check gate is: density plateau within exp range AND density CV<0.25 AND P2 nematic<0.10 AND energy drift within bounds. C(t) advisory only.
t_equil_ns=15.0 with 8 annealing cycles at 780K is the polymer_rules.json default for PSFO; PSU1 used this protocol and passed equil-check.

decisions.choice: T range [250, 750] K, step 20K, rates [40, 160, 400] K/ns, multirate slope gate

evidence.claim: Experimental Tg (PSU/Udel) = 463K. MD Tg expected ~499-580K after overestimate (PSU1 gave 499.7K). Sweep [250,750]K brackets both experimental and MD Tg with >200K margin on each side.

tg_rates=[40,160,400] K/ns from polymer_rules.json. PSU1 used 640 K/ns which degenerated (failed slope gate). Rates must satisfy slope-sign gate (b>0); multirate log-linear R2>=0.90 required. Slowest rate (40 K/ns) used for Tg report if gate passes.
tg_steps_per_T=2,000,000 (2 ns per 20K step at rate 40 K/ns: 20K/(40K/ns)=0.5ns steps; steps=500K per step at 40K/ns). Default from polymer_rules.json.

alternatives.name: single rate 640 K/ns (PSU1 approach)
alternatives.reason_rejected: PSU1 slope gate failure — rate too fast for this rigid backbone. [40,160,400] K/ns selected from polymer_rules.json update.

evidence.claim: PSU is glassy at 300K (Tg=463K exp, 499.7K from PSU1 >> 300K). Glassy BM via Murnaghan NPT ±1000 atm at 300K using npt_prod300_out.data, per policy D-07 (Born removed 2026-06-21). PSU1 K=4.43 GPa from Murnaghan within exp range [4.0,5.5] GPa.
Born+NVT removed from pipeline 2026-06-21: PCFF+PPPM virial inflates K_Born 8-15x and Var(P) ~1e7x; failed 3/3 runs (PMMA4/PVC1/PEEK1). Murnaghan is the only validated glassy K method.
Fallback: 3-direction uniaxial deformation if Murnaghan fit_converged=False or B0_prime outside [4,20]. Isotropy_delta_pct>=20% is hard FAIL.

alternatives.name: Born matrix (NVT)
alternatives.reason_rejected: REMOVED 2026-06-21. PCFF+PPPM virial incompatibility confirmed across 3 runs.

alternatives.name: Volume fluctuation
alternatives.reason_rejected: Cross-check only; not primary for glassy polymers per policy.

evidence.claim: FF family: PCFF → by_forcefield[pcff] default = engine=kokkos, mpi=1, gpu_per_run=1. KOKKOS full-offload (pair+class2 bonded+pppm+neigh on GPU). Parity PASS 2026-06-20 vs GPU-pkg (0.000% on all energy terms + pressure tensor). ~7.9x speedup vs GPU-pkg A0 baseline at 1 rank.

Estimated cell: ~54 atoms/monomer (PCFF all-atom) × DP=20 × nchain=10 ≈ 10,800 atoms. Benchmark cell: 3020 atoms. Ratio: 3.6× — outside [0.5×,2×] adoption window for directional_probe.recommended_by_ff. Cannot adopt recommended_by_ff; must use by_forcefield default.

values_are_benchmarked=false (calibration_note: 'partial revalidation, CPU contended'). directional_probe measured_on: '4x A800 40GB / 32 phys cores' vs live host: '4x RTX 6000 24GB / 18 phys cores' — host mismatch. Hardware uncertainty recorded; hardware_benchmark probe planned.

mpi=1 is CANONICAL for PCFF/KOKKOS (kspace on GPU, not CPU-serial). The context note 'MPI=4 (PCFF/PPPM needs multi-rank)' is pre-KOKKOS: that rule applies to the GPU-package path (engine=gpu). KOKKOS kspace is GPU-offloaded at mpi=1. Memory: 'pcff/opls defaults flipped to engine=kokkos mpi=1'.
D-08 confidence: low (values_are_benchmarked=false + host mismatch + cell 3.6× benchmark). Hardware_benchmark probe planned to validate on live host before or alongside PSU2 run.

alternatives.name: engine=gpu, mpi=4 (GPU-package fallback)
alternatives.reason_rejected: KOKKOS is 7.9× faster than GPU-pkg A0 at mpi=1; GPU-pkg fallback reserved for KOKKOS binary failure only. mpi=4 is the pre-KOKKOS GPU-pkg setting, not applicable here.

alternatives.name: engine=kokkos, mpi=4
alternatives.reason_rejected: mpi=1 is canonical for KOKKOS/PCFF per validated parity run. Multi-rank KOKKOS also carries GPU-pinning footgun (mpirun doesn't forward CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES; requires env CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=N lmp without mpirun).

findings: Gate verified independently: PSFO confidence=medium -> reasoned mode; plan_mode=reasoned matches (no confidence-gate bypass).

D-01_ff (evidence_required): all 4 criteria covered; PCFF cited with source_doi 10.1021/ja00086a030 + PSU1 empirical anchor (Tg +8.1%, density -4.3%, K in range) + Hayashi2022/Afzal2021; alternatives (OPLS-AA, GAFF2) rejected with stated errors. PASS.
D-03_electrostatics (evidence_required): PPPM mandated for heteroatom backbone (S/O/aromatic-C, |q|>0.1e) per electrostatics_decision_guide; require satisfied; lj/cut alternative rejected. PASS.

D-07_property_method (evidence_required): glassy Murnaghan NPT 300K primary (Wu 2019 DOI 10.1016/j.commatsci.2019.06.006), Born removal cited, 3-dir deform fallback; require (glassy K via Murnaghan) satisfied. PASS.

D-05_convergence: DP=20<30 so require_glassy does NOT apply; equil success_criterion is overall_pass:true (correct standard gate). Aromatic-C(t) advisory note is over-explanation but does not weaken the binding gate field. PASS.

D-06_tg_fit_quality: T range [250,750] brackets exp Tg 463K with >200K margin; rates [40,160,400] match polymer_rules; multirate slope_gate + loglinear R2>=0.90 and bilinear R2 gates present (Tg never reported without R2). PASS.

D-08_hardware (always-on): pin kokkos/mpi=1/gpu_per_run=1 is IDENTICAL to by_forcefield[pcff] default, so staleness clauses (values_are_benchmarked=false + directional_probe.host A800 != live RTX 6000) do not bite; recommended_by_ff explicitly declined (cell ~10800 vs 3020, 3.6x outside adoption window). mpi=1 is canonical for PCFF/KOKKOS (kspace on GPU) per by_forcefield.pcff.note. confidence:low + hardware_benchmark probe over-delivered. Concurrency, GPU-count, size all consistent. PASS.
Locked params verified vs REVISION_PARAMS.md: emc_seed=820419, velocity_seed=611213, DP=20, nchain=10 all match the PSU2 baseline row.

Stage schema: all stages have stage/track/success_criteria; tracks valid. NOTE (non-blocking, stale-policy artifact): 'analyze-tg-multirate' is absent from decision_policy.json track_map though its track 'thermal' is correct and the stage is a required slope-gate hard stop; the gap is in the policy dict, not the plan, and has no planner-side fix.
All three requested properties (bulk_modulus, density, tg) are covered by planned_stages.

deviations_from_defaults: dp_typical: 25 -> 20 (dp_min floor; PSU1 precedent; REVISION_PARAMS.md locked)
critique.status: approved -> proposed (reasoned path requires critic round)
born stage removed: replaced by murnaghan (Born removed 2026-06-21)
added emc_seed=820419, velocity_seed=611213 (REVISION_PARAMS.md PSU2 locked seeds)
analyze-tg-multirate restored as separate stage (scaffold omitted; required for slope-gate validation)
